reviews.comment:
Siempre un buen lugar para parar, comer y seguir viaje. Tiene mesas debajo de los árboles y lugar para estacionar. Los baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Always a good place to stop, eat, and continue your journey. It has tables under the trees and parking. The restrooms are clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtM1l3VRAB

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada al regreso de la costa muy cuidado y limpio y buena atencion

(Translated by Google)
A must stop on the way back from the coast, very well maintained and clean, with good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtbmJmR0VnEAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar genial para descansar cargar combustible y pilas para continuar el viaje.
Tiene mesas y lugares para sentarse. Llevar tu comida o un 24 hs con todo por si deseas comprar y comer alli

(Translated by Google)
A great place to rest, refuel, and recharge for the rest of your journey. It has tables and seating. Bring your own food or a 24-hour convenience store if you'd like to buy groceries and eat there.

reviews.comment:
No soy un viajero regular pero cada vez que voy a MDP paro acá, arrienden muy bien y tiene un entorno natural que dar para relajarse un ratito, sirve para gente como yo que hace del viaje parte de sus vacaciones.
Luego cada uno con lo suyo.

(Translated by Google)
I'm not a regular traveler, but every time I go to Mar del Plata, I stop here. The rentals are great, and it has a beautiful natural setting perfect for relaxing for a while. It's ideal for people like me who make travel part of their vacation.
Then, to each their own.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtemN6LVdREAE
